resources.string: Indlela Yokuphuza Amanzi Ngokufanele
Phuza ngamanani amancane usuku lonke, hhayi ngesikhathi esisodwa
Ungalindi kuze uzizwe ukoma kakhulu ukuphuza.
Gwema ukuphuza amanzi amaningi ngesikhathi esisodwa, ngoba kungabangela ukungakhululeki futhi, kubantu abanezimo ezingaphansi, kuholele ngisho nokungalingani kwe-electrolyte.
Ukuphuzwa kwamanzi okunconyiwe nsuku zonke
Cishe 30–35 ml ngekilogramu yesisindo somzimba ngosuku.
Uma usebenza kakhulu, isimo sezulu siyashisa, noma ujuluka kakhulu → uzodinga ukwandisa ukudla kwakho.
Uma unenkinga yenhliziyo, izinso, noma umfutho wegazi → kufanele uthintane nodokotela wakho ngaphambi kokulungisa ukuthi angakanani amanzi owaphuzayo.
Isikhathi esingcono kakhulu sokuphuza amanzi
Ngemva kokuvuka: ingilazi encane yamanzi afudumele ukusiza “ukuqalisa” umzimba wakho.
Ekuseni kakhulu naphakathi nantambama: phuza izingilazi ezincane ezingu-1-2, futhi ungalindi uze wome ngempela.
imizuzu engu-30 ngaphambi kokudla: ingilazi encane eyodwa ukweseka ukugaya ukudla (gwema ukuphuza kakhulu ngaphambi kokudla).
1–2 amahora ngaphambi kokulala: uma ungajwayele ukuvuka uyokuchama ebusuku, ungaphuza iziphuzo ezimbalwa; gwema ukuphuza kakhulu ngaphambi kokulala.
Hlobo luni lwamanzi okufanele uphuze?
Izinketho ezingcono kakhulu:
Amanzi abilisiwe futhi apholile
Amanzi abilisiwe futhi apholile
Amanzi amaminerali avela emthonjeni othembekile
Nciphisa ukudla kwakho kwe:
Iziphuzo ezithambile ezinoshukela / iziphuzo ezinekhabhoni.
Iziphuzo ezinoshukela omningi kakhulu (itiye lobisi, amajusi asemabhodleleni, njll.)
Ikhofi, itiye, neziphuzo ezifanayo kusabalwa njengengxenye yoketshezi lwakho oluphuzayo, kodwa kuqukethe i-caffeine → akufanele uzibale ngo-100% ubhekise kumgomo wakho wamanzi wansuku zonke.
Lalela umzimba wakho
Izimpawu zokuthi ungase uphelelwe amanzi emzimbeni:
Umchamo ophuzi omnyama onephunga eliqinile.
Izilevu ezomile, isikhumba esomile, ukuphaphazeka kwekhanda, ukukhathala
Ukuchama okuncane kakhulu emini
Izimpawu zokuthi ungase uphuze amanzi ngokweqile (ikakhulukazi esikhathini esifushane):
Ukuchama njalo ngomchamo ocacile, onjengamanzi.
Uzizwa ugcwele, unesiyezi, unezinkathazo zekhanda, noma uzizwa uphaphatheka.
→ Uma unezimo zempilo eziyisisekelo noma ubona noma yini engajwayelekile, kufanele ubone udokotela.
Qaphela lawa maphutha ajwayelekile okuphuza amanzi.
Ukulinda uze WOMELE ukuphuza
Uma uzizwa ukhantshile, umzimba wakho sewuphelelwe amanzi kancane.
Izinkinga: Zingakwenza ukhathele, zikunike izinhlungu zekhanda, futhi zehlise ukunaka kwakho.
Ilungiswa kanjani:
Phuza amanzi kancane kancane kulo lonke usuku kunokuba ulinde kuze udidikile:
Ngemva kokuvuka: ingilazi encane eyodwa (200–300 ml).
Ekushoneni kwemini, ntambama, kusihlwa: ingilazi encane eyodwa ngesikhathi ngasinye.
Ukuphuza okuncane kakhulu kunalokho okudingwa ngumzimba wakho
Ukuphuza amaglasi 2–3 kuphela ngosuku, ikakhulukazi okuvamile kubasebenzi basehhovisini abahleli emagumbini anezimo zomoya ezilawulwayo.
Izinkinga: Isikhumba esomile, ukuqunjelwa, ukukhathala, ukuchama kancane, umchamo omnyama ophuzi.
Indlela yokulungisa: Ukuphakanyiswa kokuphuza amanzi nsuku zonke (konke okuvela emanzini ahlanzekile + isobho + izithelo):
Ngokuvamile: 30–40 ml ngekhilogremu ngayinye yomzimba ngosuku.
Isibonelo: 60 kg → cishe 1.8–2.4 amalitha/ngosuku.
Uma uvivinya kakhulu noma kushisa kakhulu: khulisa ukungenisa kwakho.
Ukuphuza kakhulu ngesikhathi esisodwa
Ukukhohlwa ukuphuza usuku lonke, bese "ukwenza isinxephezelo" ebusuku ngokuphuza amalitha angu-1–2 ngasikhathi sinye.
Izinkinga:
Ilayisha ngokweqile izinso futhi inganciphisa i-sodium egazini (akuvamile kodwa iyingozi).
Kungabangela ukuqunjelwa, ukungagayeki kahle kokudla, nesicanucanu.
Hlukanisa: phuza cishe u-150-250 ml ngesikhathi, izikhathi eziningana usuku lonke.
Ukuphuza eduze kakhulu nezikhathi zokudla
Ukuphuza amamililitha angu-500–700 amanzi ngaphambi noma emva kokudla.
Izinkinga: Kunciphisa i-asidi yesisu, kungase kwehlise ukugaya ukudla futhi kubangele ukuvuvukala (ikakhulukazi kubantu abanezisu ezibucayi).
imizuzu engama-30 ngaphambi kokudla: ingilazi encane eyodwa (100–200 ml).
Phakathi nesidlo: phuza amancane uma kudingeka.
Gwema ukuphuza kakhulu ngokushesha ngemva kokudla okukhulu.
Ukungaphuzi ngokwanele ngaphambi, phakathi, nangemva kokuzilolonga
Ukugijima, ukudlala ibhola, noma ukuzilolonga ejimini bese uyabona ngemuva ukuthi awuphuzanga lutho phakathi nesikhathi sonke.
Izinkinga: Ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni, amajaqamba emisipha, ukukhathala, umfutho wegazi ophansi, isiyezi.
imizuzu engu-30–60 ngaphambi kokuzivocavoca: phuza u-200–300 ml.
Ngesikhathi sokuzivocavoca: njalo ngemizuzu eyi-15-20, phuza kancane.
Ngemva kokuzivocavoca: phuza amanzi kancane kancane, ungaphuzi inani elikhulu ngasikhathi sinye.
Ukuphuza njalo amanzi abandayo/abandayo
Ukuthanda iziphuzo ezibandayo unyaka wonke.
Kungabangela ukuvinjelwa kwemithambo yegazi kungazelelwe emphinjeni, kwenze umphimbo obuhlungu nokukhwehlela kube nokwenzeka kakhulu.
Kubantu abanezinkinga zesisu, kungadala ukuphazamiseka kanye nobuhlungu besisu.
Ungayilungisa kanjani: Sebenzisa amanzi abandayo noma apholile kancane, futhi gwema amanzi abandayo kakhulu kuze kube sezingeni lapho amazinyo akho ebuhlungu njalo.
Ukusebenzisa iziphuzo ezinoshukela esikhundleni samanzi ahlanzekile
Ukukhetha iziphuzo ezithambile, itiye lobisi, iziphuzo zamandla, amajusi asebhulohweni… njengoketshezi lwakho oluyinhloko esikhundleni kwamanzi.
Kwenyusa ushukela wegazi, kwandisa ingozi yokuzuza isisindo nokonakala kwamazinyo.
Awekho umswakama kahle njengamanzi ahlanzekile.
Amanzi acwebile kufanele asengaba yisiphuzo sakho esiyinhloko.
Iziphuzo ezinoshukela: ziciphise uziphate njengokuzijabulisa okwenzeka ngezikhathi ezithile, kungeyona indawo yakho yokuthomalalisa nsuku zonke.
Ukunganaki umbala womchamo wakho
Phuzi elikhanyayo, elicacile kahle: ngokuvamile lihle.
Umchamo ophuzi okudakiwe onephunga elinamandla: ungase uphelelwe amanzi (kuphandle uma uthatha imithi ethile/amavithamini).
Bomvu, nsundu, noma mancwe ngokungavamile: kufanele ubone udokotela.
Ukukholwa ngokungacabangi ukuthi "kufanele uphuze amalitha amathathu ngosuku"
Ukuzibophezela ekulandeleni inani elinqunyiwe (2–3 amalitha) ngaphandle kokucabangela isisindo somzimba wakho, izinga lomsebenzi, noma isimo sezulu. Izidingo zomuntu ngamunye ziyahluka
Ifomula yesisindo somzimba engama-30-40 ml/kg.
Umuzwa wakho wokoma
Umbala womchamo wakho
Ukuphuza amanzi amaningi ngaphambi kokulala
Ukuphuza u-500-700 ml wamanzi ngaphambi nje kokulala ngoba ucabanga ukuthi “alungele izinso nesikhumba”
Ungase udinge ukuvuka ukuze uchame, okuphazamisa ubuthongo bakho.
Abantu asebekhulile noma abanezinkinga zenhliziyo noma izitho zomzimba bangase babe nezinyawo ezivuvukile, ukuvuvukala, nokungakhululeki.
amahora angu-1–2 ngaphambi kokulala: ungaphuza ingilazi encane.
Ngaphambi nje kokulala: vele uphuze kancane uma uzizwa womile.
Izinzuzo zokuphuza amanzi kalamula
Umnandi wesitirasi okhanyayo wenza amanzi abe mnandi kakhulu, ngakho abantu abaningi baphuza kakhulu ngokwemvelo usuku lonke.
Ukuphakamisa iVitamini C
Ulamula awumthombo omuhle kavithamini C, i-antioxidant esekela amasosha omzimba futhi isiza ukuvikela amangqamuzana emonakalweni.
Ixhasa ukugaya
Amanzi kalamula afudumele ekuseni angase akhuthaze ukugaya futhi asize abanye abantu bazizwe bequnjelwe kancane noma besindwa ngemva kokudla.
Kwenza umoya uphume uhlanzekile
Ukunambitheka okune-asidi, okusawolintshi kungasiza ekunciphiseni umoya omubi okwesikhashana (kodwa kusafanele ugeze ngamanzi angenalutho kamuva ukuze uvikele amazinyo akho).
Ingase isekele impilo yesikhumba
Ukuhlala unamanzi kahle kanye nokuthola i-vitamin C kungasiza ekukhiqizeni i-collagen, ebalulekile ekuguquguqukeni kwesikhumba nasekubukekeni kwesikhumba ngokujwayelekile.
Indlela amanzi asiza ngayo ukulala kangcono
Igcina umzimba wakho ukulingana
Uma ugcwele amanzi ngendlela efanele, inhliziyo yakho, ukujikeleza kwegazi, nezinga lokushisa lomzimba kuzinza kakhulu. Lokhu kusiza umzimba wakho ukhululeke futhi ushintshe ngokushelela ekulaleni.
Yehlisa amajaqamba ebusuku nokungaphatheki kahle
Ukoma okuncane kungaholela ekubambeni kwemisipha, izinhlungu zekhanda, umlomo owomile, noma isilomo esibuhlungu ebusuku — konke lokhu kungakuvusa noma kwenze kube nzima ukulala.
Isiza umzimba wakho ukuthi ululame ngenkathi uphumule
Ukuhlala unamanzi kusiza ukugeleza kwegazi nokususa imfucuza, kusiza umzimba wakho ukuthi ubuyisele amandla ngesikhathi sokulala okujulile.
Qaphela: Phuza iningi lamanzi akho ekuseni, bese uphuza kancane ebusuku—gwema ukuphuza kakhulu ngaphambi kokulala ukuze ungavuki uyophuma indle.
Isekela umsebenzi wehomoni kanye nohlelo lwezinzwa

Amanzi adlala indima endleleni umzimba wakho okhiqiza futhi ulawula ngayo amahomoni athile nama-neurotransmitters. Uma ungaphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni, izinqubo ezithonya umjikelezo wakho wokulala nokuvuka zingasebenza kahle kakhulu.
Ukuphuza amanzi nokwehlisa isisindo
Kusiza ukulawula isifiso sokudla

Sivame ukudideka phakathi kokoma nokulamba. Ukuphuza ingilazi yamanzi kuqala kusiza ukuthi uhlukanise, futhi ukuphuza amanzi imizuzu engu-15–30 ngaphambi kokudla kungakusiza uzizwe ugcwele ngezabelo ezincane.
Ithatha indawo yeziphuzo ezinekhalori ephezulu

Ukushintsha iziphuzo ezinoshukela (iziphuzo ezimnandi, itiye lobisi, ikhofi elimnandi, ijusi) uze uphuze amanzi ahlanzekile kunciphisa kakhulu amakhalori "angenalutho". Emasontweni nasezinyangeni, lokhu kuncipha kungaba nomthelela omkhulu esisindweni sakho.
Isekela i-metabolism kanye namazinga wamandla

Noma ukoma okuncane kungakwenza uzizwe ukhathele futhi ungafuni ukuhamba noma ukuzivocavoca. Ukuhlala unamanzi okwanele kusiza umzimba wakho usebenze kahle, kusekela ukushintsha kwamandla okujwayelekile, futhi kwenza kube lula ukuhlala usebenza.
Kusiza ukugaya ukudla futhi kunciphisa ukuvuvukala
Ukuphuza amanzi anele kusiza uhlelo lwakho lokugaya ukudla lusebenze kahle futhi kunganciphisa ukuqunjelwa nokuvuvukala, okunye okwenza abantu bazizwe “besindayo” kunalokho abakhona ngempela.
Isikhumbuzo esibalulekile:
Ukudla ukudla okulinganiselayo, okunekhalori ephansi.
Ukunyakaza okwengeziwe (ukuzivocavoca, ukuhamba, umsebenzi wansuku zonke)
Ukulala nokuphatha ingcindezi
Sebenzisa amanzi ngokuhlakanipha: Phuza amanzi njalo, shintsha iziphuzo ezinoshukela uma kungenzeka, futhi phuza ingilazi ngaphambi kokudla—ungaphuzi ngokweqile.
Ukuphuza amanzi kanye nohlelo lokugaya
Kusiza ukuqala ukugaya emlonyeni
Amanzi ayingxenye eyinhloko yamathe, asiza ukuthambisa ukudla futhi aqale ukuphula ama-carbohydrate. Lokhu kwenza ukugwinya kube lula futhi kunciphisa ubunzima ku-esophagus nesisu sakho.
Isekela ukusebenza kwesisu

Isisu sakho sidinga uketshezi olwanele ukuze sihlanganise ukudla ne-asidi yesisu kanye nama-enzyme okugaya ukudla. Le “ngxube” isiza ukuhlephula ukudla kube izingcezu ezincane ukuze imisoco ikwazi ukumuncwa kalula emathunjini.
Igcina izinto zihamba emathunjini
Amanzi asiza ekuncibilikiseni izakhamzimba futhi azihambise emgudwini wokugaya ukudla. Iphinde igcine okuqukethwe kwamathumbu akho kuthambile futhi kuhamba, kunciphisa ingozi yokuqunjelwa.
Isebenza ndawonye nefayibha

I-fiber yokudla (kusuka emifino, izithelo, okusanhlamvu) idinga amanzi ukuze yenze umsebenzi wayo ngendlela efanele. Ngaphandle kwamanzi anele, ukudla okunefiber ephezulu kungabangela ukuqunjelwa kanye nendle eqinile. Ngamanzi anele, i-fiber isiza ukwakha indle ethambile, eningi okudlula kalula.
Kwehlisa ukuqunjelwa nokuvuvukala

Lapho uphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni, umzimba wakho ukhipha amanzi amaningi esitokisini, uwenze wome futhi uqine. Lokhu kungaholela ekuqunjweni, ukucindezelwa, ama-hemorrhoids, kanye nomuzwa wokusinda noma ukuqunjelwa.
Kunganciphisa ukushisa esiswini kwabanye abantu

Ukuphuza amanzi kancane kancane kunganciphisa ukushisa kwenhliziyo okuncane, kodwa ukuphuza kakhulu ngesikhathi sokudla kungathuthukisa ukubuya kokudla kwabanye—ngakho-ke gcina inani eliphakathi nendawo nelikhululekile.
Phuza amanzi njalo usuku lonke
Phuza ingilazi encane imizuzu engu-15–30 ngaphambi kokudla.
Ngesikhathi sokudla, phuza kancane—ungaphuzi ngokushesha.
Uma uvame ukuba nokugcwala noma ukuvaleka, yandisa kokubili amanzi kanye nefayibha ndawonye.
Imiphumela yamanzi ebuchosheni nasekugxileni
Igcina amandla nokuqapha

Ubuchopho bungama-70–75% amanzi, ngakho noma ukoma okuncane kungabangela ukukhathala nokungacaci kwengqondo. Ukuhlala unamanzi emzimbeni kusiza ukuthi ucabange ngokucacile futhi uzizwe uqaphile kakhulu.
Isekela ukugxila nokunaka
Ukoma kunganciphisa ukugxila nokunaka, okubangela abafundi, abasebenzi behhovisi, nabashayeli ukuba baphazamiseke futhi benze amaphutha amaningi.
Isiza amazinga emizwa nengcindezi
Ukungaphuzi amanzi anele kungakwenza ube nenkani, udangele, futhi ube nengcindezi enkulu. Ukuhlala unamanzi emzimbeni kusiza ubuchopho bakho ukuthi bulawule imizwa ngendlela ezinzile.
Yehlisa ubuhlungu bekhanda kwabanye abantu

Ukungaphuzi amanzi ngokwanele kungabangela izinhlungu zekhanda kubantu abaningi. Nakuba ukoma kungesona isizathu sazo zonke izinhlungu zekhanda, ukuphuza njalo kungasiza ukunciphisa izinhlungu zekhanda ezihlobene nokoma okuncane.
Isekela inkumbulo nokusebenza kwengqondo
Ukugcina ukumanzi kusekela inkumbulo, isikhathi sokusabela, nokugxila—ikakhulukazi ngesikhathi kwezivivinyo noma amaseshini amade okusebenza.

Ungathembeli ikhofi noma iziphuzo zamandla kuphela. Gcina amanzi eduze futhi uphuze kancane njalo—ikakhulukazi lapho ufunda, usebenza, noma ushayela. Umchamo oqandi kancane namandla aqhubekayo kuyizimpawu zokuthi uketsheziwe kahle.
Umthelela wotshwala empilweni yakho
Imiphumela yesikhashana
Utshwala bungabambezela ukusabela kwakho futhi kulimaze ibhalansi, kwandise ingozi yengozi.
Kungase kuthinte imizwa nokuziphatha (kusuka ekukhululekeni kuye ekucasukeni noma ekubeni nolaka).
Kuphinde kukomise umzimba wakho ngokwandisa ukuhamba kwendle, okuholela ekubuhlungwini bekhanda, umlomo owomile, kanye nokuphathwa kabi emva kokuphuza utshwala.
Ngaphezu kwalokho, kungacasula isisu futhi kubangele isicanucanu, ukuhlanza, noma ubuhlungu.
Imiphumela yesikhathi eside (ngokuphuza kaningi noma ukuphuza kakhulu)

Ukulimala kwesibindi: Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, utshwala bungabangela isibindi esinamafutha, isifo sokusha kwesibindi kohlobo, futhi ekugcineni nesifo sokuqina kwesibindi, lapho izicubu ezibomvu zithatha indawo yezicubu zesibindi ezinempilo.
Izinkinga zenhliziyo nomfutho wegazi: Ukuphuza kakhulu ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kungakhuphula umfutho wegazi, kwenze inhliziyo ibe buthaka, futhi kunyuse ingozi yesifo senhliziyo nesifo sohlangothi.
Impilo yobuchopho nengqondo: Ukusetshenziswa kotshwala isikhathi eside kungaphazamisa inkumbulo nokugxila, isimo sengqondo sibe sibi (ukukhathazeka/ukucindezeleka), futhi kwandise ingozi yokulutheka.

Isimiso sokugaya ukudla kanye nengozi yomdlavuza: Ukusebenzisa kakhulu utshwala isikhathi eside kungalimaza ulwelwesi lomlomo, umphimbo, isisu, namathumbu, futhi kwandisa ingozi yokuba nomdlavuza eminingana (ikakhulukazi umlomo, umphimbo, isibindi, ibele, nekholoni).
Amasosha omzimba: Ukuphuza ngokweqile kungawenza buthaka amasosha akho omzimba, kwenze kube nzima ngomzimba wakho ukulwa nezifo.
Isisindo kanye nokulala

Utshwala ungeza amakhalori "angenalutho" angaholela ekuzuzeni isisindo, ikakhulukazi uma usebenzisa iziphuzo ezinoshukela noma ukudla okuncane ebusuku. Kungasiza ukuthi ulale ngokushesha, kodwa kuphazamisa ukulala okujulile nokulala kwe-REM, kwehlisa ikhwalithi yokulala.

Qaphela: Ukuphuza okuncane kuya kokulingene akuphephile ngokuphelele. Kwabanye abantu (ukukhulelwa, izimo ezithile zezempilo, imithi ethile, noma umlando wokuthembela), ukukhetha okuphephile kakhulu wukungaphuzi utshwala.
Ukuphuza amanzi ukunciphisa izinduna zehormoni
Isekela ukususwa kwemfucuza emzimbeni nokulinganisela
Izinso zakho nesibindi zicubungula amahomoni nemfundu. Ukumanjana kahle kuzisiza ukusebenza kahle, okusiza ukulingana kwamahomoni kanye nesikhumba esiphilile kakhudlwana.
Isiza ukugcina umgoqo wesikhumba kanye nomswakama

Ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni kungenza isikhumba sibukeke sifiphele, siqinile, futhi sicasuka kalula. Ukuhlala unamanzi kusekela umgoqo wesikhumba futhi kunganciphisa ububomvu nokucasuka okuhlobene nezinduna.
Isekela ukugeleza kwegazi nokulethwa kwezondlo
Amanzi asiza ukugcina igazi ligeleza kahle:
Izakhamzimba, umoya-mpilo, nezinhlanganisela ezizuzisayo zithuthwa ngokuphumelelayo emangqamuzaneni esikhumba.
Imfucuza ihanjiswa ngempumelelo
Lokhu kungasiza ekuthuthukiseni isikhumba esikhanyayo, esinempilo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
Kunganciphisa uwoyela obangelwa ukoma
Kwabanye abantu, lapho isikhumba siphelelwe amanzi kakhulu:
Ingase inxephezele ngokukhiqiza amafutha amaningi
Lokhu kungenza isikhumba sibukeke sikhazimula kodwa sisazizwe somile ngaphansi
Ukuhlala unamanzi (futhi usebenzisa umswakama ofanele) kungasiza isikhumba sakho sizizwe silinganisekile futhi singazami kakhulu.
Indlela yokuphuza amanzi ukuze unciphise amafutha ebusweni
Isekela ukufuma kwesikhumba kusuka ngaphakathi
Amanzi asiza ukugcina ibhalansi jikelele yoketshezi emzimbeni wakho. Lapho umanzi kahle:
Isikhumba sakho mancane amathuba okuba sizizwe siqinile, simaholosha, noma sixegekile
Imigca emincane ebangelwa ukoma ingabonakala ithambile.
Kucabange njengokunikeza isikhumba sakho “isisekelo” esingcono ukuze okokuthambisa kwakho kanye nesimiso sokunakekela isikhumba sisebenze ngempumelelo.
Iyasiza umgoqo wesikhumba ukusebenza ngcono
Kwabanye, isikhumba esiphelelwe amanzi kakhulu singabangela isikhumba ukuthi sikhiqize amafutha amaningi ukukhokhela ukoma.
Nakuba amanzi awakumisi isikhumba esinamafutha, ukuhlala unamamanzi kanye nokusebenzisa isithambisi esifanele kungasiza isikhumba sakho sizizwe silinganile kakhulu.
Iyasiza ezinqubweni zokucwasa (ngendlela engaqondile)
Amanzi ngokwawo awakhiphi izinto ezingcolile esikhumbeni sakho njengomlingo, kodwa:
Isiza izinso zakho nesibindi kusebenze kahle
Lezi zingxenye zomzimba zisebenza ekucubunguleni imfucuza nemikhiqizo engaphansi, engathinta ukuvuvukala emzimbeni uma ingaphathwa kahle
Ukuncishiswa kwengcindezi yangaphakathi kungabonakala ngaphandle njengesikhumba esizolile, esilinganayo kakhudlwana.
Amaphutha okuphuza amanzi alimaza isikhumba sakho
Ukuphuza amanzi kancane kakhulu usuku lonke

Ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni okungapheli okungamahlalakhona kungenza isikhumba sakho sibukeke sifiphele, siqinile, futhi sithambekele kakhulu emigqeni emihle ebangelwa ukoma. Kungenza futhi ububomvu nokucasuka kubonakale kakhulu.
Ukukholelwa ukuthi “amanzi wodwa azolungisa isikhumba sami”

Amanzi asekela isikhumba esinempilo, kodwa awakwazi ukuthatha indawo yokuvikela ilanga, isimiso esihle sokunakekelwa kwesikhumba, ukudla okunomsoco, ukulala, nokulawula ingcindezi. Ukuthembela emanzini okuphuza kuphela nokungazinaki lezi zici kungakushiya udangele.
Izikhathi ezingcono kakhulu zokuphuza amanzi ukuze isikhumba sibushelelezi, sicace
Ngemva kokuvuka

Phuza ingilazi encane eyodwa (200–300 ml) ekuseni. Lokhu kusiza ukuvuselela umzimba wakho emva kokulala ubusuku bonke futhi kusekela ukujikeleza kwegazi kanye nezinqubo zokuhlanza umzimba ezithinta isikhumba sakho.
imizuzu engama-30 ngaphambi kokudla
Phuza ingilazi encane yamanzi imizuzu engu-20–30 ngaphambi kokudla.
Lokhu kusekela ukugaya, kusiza imisoco ukumunca kangcono, futhi kungase kuvimbele imizwa esindayo, yokuqunjelwa engabonakala ebusweni bakho.
Phakathi kokudla (hhayi nje ngesikhathi sokudla)
Phuza amanzi phakathi kokudla esikhundleni sokuphuza kuphela ngesikhathi sokudla.
Ukugcina umzimba unamanzi kahle kusiza ukugcina isithiyo sesikhumba sizinzile, sinciphisa ukoma nokucasuka.
Ngaphambi nangemva kokuzivocavoca

Ngaphambi kokuzivocavoca: phuza ingilazi encane yamanzi.Ngemva kokuzivocavoca: buyisela amanzi kancane kancane.Ukuphuza kahle ngesikhathi sokujuluka nokululama kusiza ukugeleza kwegazi nokulungiswa kwesikhumba, kukunike ukukhanya okunempilo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
Ngesikhathi eside sokubuka isikrini noma ukufunda

Uma usebenza noma ufunda amahora amaningi, phuza kancane njalo ngemva kwemizuzu engu-30-60. Lokhu kugcina ukujikeleza kwegazi nokugxila kuqinile, futhi kuvimbela isikhumba sakho ekutholeni lokho kubukeka okukhathele, okufiphele.
1–2 amahora ngaphambi kokulala (kodwa ungadli kakhulu ngaphambi kokulala)
Ungaphuza ingilazi encane ihora elilodwa kuya kwelibili ngaphambi kokulala.
Gwema ukuphuza amanzi amaningi ngaphambi kokulala ukuze ukulala kwakho (nokulungiswa kwesikhumba sakho ebusuku) kungaphazamiseki ukuhamba uye endlini yangasese.
Ukuphuza amanzi ngesikhathi senyanga yakho
Kwehlisa ukuvuvukala nokubamba amanzi
Ukuphuza amanzi anele empeleni kusiza umzimba wakho ukukhulula uketshezi oluningi. Lokhu kungadambisa lowo muzwa osindayo, wokukhukhumala esiswini nasemilenzeni yakho.
Isiza ngamajaqamba kanye nekhanda elibuhlungu
Ukoma okuncane kungakhuphula ubuhlungu besikhathi nentloko. Ukuphuza amanzi kusiza ukugeleza kwegazi nokusebenza kwemisipha, okungasiza ukunciphisa ukungakhululeki.
Isekela isimo sengqondo namandla
Uma unamanzi ambalwa, kungenzeka uzizwe ukhathele, ukhathazekile, futhi ungacacile engqondweni.
Ukuphuza amanzi kahle kusiza ukugcina amandla akho nokugxila kwakho kuzinzile ngesikhathi somjikelezo wakho.
Isiza ekugayeni

Abantu abaningi babhekana nokuqunjelwa noma izinguquko zokugaya ukudla ngesikhathi sabo. Ukuphuza amanzi anele (kanye nokudla i-fiber) kusiza ukugcina amathumbu akho enyakaza futhi kunciphisa ukuqunjelwa.
Ukunisela kwabesifazane abakhulelwe
Isekela umthamo wegazi kanye nokujikeleza kwegazi

Isekela umthamo wegazi kanye nokujikeleza kwegazi. Ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, umthamo wegazi lakho uyanda. Ukuphuza amanzi anele kusiza inhliziyo yakho nemithambo yegazi ukuthi isebenze kahle ukuze ilethe umoya-mpilo nezakhamzimba enganeni.
Kusiza ukudala uketshezi lwesibeletho
Amanzi asiza ekukhiqizeni amanzi amnion, avikela futhi avikele ingane yakho esibelethweni.
Yehlisa ukungakhululeki okuvamile kokukhulelwa
Yehlisa ukuqunjelwa kanye nama-hemorrhoids.
Nciphisa ukuvuvukala (ukubamba amanzi).
Yehlisa ithuba lokuphathwa yikhanda nesiyezi
Isekela ukusebenza kwezinso
Kungaphuzwa malini (umhlahlandlela ojwayelekile)
Abesifazane abakhulelwe kufanele baphokophele amalitha angu-2-2.5 oketshezi ngosuku, kuye ngobukhulu bomzimba, isimo sezulu, kanye nezinga lomsebenzi.
Lokhu kuhlanganisa amanzi, izilayo, ubisi, itiye lamakhambi, kanye namanzi avela ekudleni (izithelo, imifino).
Umchamo ophuzi ophaphathekile = ngokuvamile onamanzi amaningi
Okuphuzi okumnyama, iphunga elinamandla = kungase kudinge uketshezi olwengeziwe
Hlala ulandela iseluleko sikadokotela noma umbelethisi wakho, ikakhulukazi uma unezimo ezifana ne-preeclampsia, izinkinga zezinso, noma isifo sikashukela sokukhulelwa.
Angakanani amanzi okufanele uwaphuze lapho kushisa?
Isiqondiso esijwayelekile
Ukuphuza okunconyelwe abantu abadala abanempilo:
2–3 amalitha ngosuku ngaphansi kwezimo ezijwayelekile.
Uma kushisa, engeza u-0.5-1 ilitha ngaphezulu, ikakhulukazi uma ujuluka kakhulu.
Umthetho olula:
30–40 ml wamanzi ngekhilogremu ngayinye yomzimba ngosuku, bese wengeza okwengeziwe uma kushisa noma usebenza kakhulu.
Isibonelo (isimo sezulu esishisayo):
Umuntu ongu-60 kg → isisekelo ~ 1.8 – 2.4L
Faka u-0.5 – 1L uma usebenza/uzivocavoca ekushiseni → Isamba ~ 2.3 – 3.4 L/ngosuku.

Esikhundleni sokujaha inombolo ephelele, qaphela:Ukoma: ukuzwa ukoma njalo = ungase udinge okwengeziwe.Umbala womchamo: ophuzi ophaphathekile = ngokuvamile kuhle; okuphuzi okumnyama = phuza kakhulu.Izimpawu zokuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni okuncane: umlomo owomile, ikhanda elibuhlungu, isiyezi, ukukhathala.
Lapho ujuluka kakhulu
Uma usebenza ngaphandle, uzivocavoca, noma ugibele isithuthuthu elangeni elishisayo: Thepha amanzi njalo (njalo ngemizuzu eyi-15–20) esikhundleni sokulinda uze wome kakhulu.
Ngokujuluka okukhulu kakhulu isikhathi eside, isixazululo sokubuyisela amanzi emzimbeni noma isiphuzo se-electrolyte singasiza esikhundleni sikasawoti (kodwa gwema iziphuzo ezinoshukela kakhulu).
Ungeqisi

Gwema ukuphoqa amanzi amaningi ngesikhathi esifushane (isibonelo, amalitha angu-1 - 2 phakathi nehora). Amanzi amaningi kakhulu ngokushesha anganciphisa ama-electrolyte futhi akwenze uzizwe ungaphilile.

Umqondo oyinhloko: Ezulazulwini olushisayo, phuza ngaphezulu kunokujwayelekile, sasaza kulo lonke usuku, bheka umbala womchamo wakho, futhi khulisa ukuphuza kwakho lapho uzittisa khona - kodwa ungaphuzi amanani amakhulu ngqa kanye.
Amathiphu okuphuza amanzi ngesikhathi uzivocavoca
Ngaphambi kokuzivocavoca kwakho

Ngaphambi kwamahora 1–2: phuza amanzi angaba ngu-300–500 ml.Ngaphambi kwemizuzu 15–20: uma uzizwa unqane amanzi, phuza amanye angu-100–200 ml.Gwenyela ukuqala ukuzilolonga usuvele unqane amanzi noma isisu sakho sigcwele amanzi kakhulu.
Phakathi nokuzilolonga kwakho
Ngokuzivocavoca okukhanyayo kuya kokulingene (ngaphansi kwehora elilodwa): Phuza u-100–150 ml njalo ngemizuzu engu-15–20.

Ezivivinyweni ezinzima/nzima (ngaphezu kwehora elilodwa), ikakhulukazi ezishisayo: Qhubeka uphuze njalo. Cabanga ukuphuza isiphuzo se-electrolyte esinoshukela ophansi uma ukhathele kakhulu.👉 Umbono oyinhloko: Phuza njalo, ungamile ulinde ukoma kakhulu.
Ngemva kokuzivocavoca kwakho
Phuza u-200-500 ml wamanzi kungakapheli imizuzu engama-30 ngemuva kokuqeda.

Uma izingubo zakho zimanzi ngenxa yokukhatheka, kungase kudingeke uphuze okwengeziwe — phuza kancane kancane emahoreni alandelayo angu-1–2. Uphawu olula: umchamo wakho kufanele ubuyele kumbala ophuzi okhanyayo kamuva ngalolo suku.
Okufanele uphuze
Okungcono kakhulu: Amanzi angenalutho okuzivocavoca okuningi.
Iziphuzo ze-Electrolyte: Ziwusizo uma:
Uzilolonga ngamandla ngaphezulu kwemizuzu engama-60.
Ujuluka kakhulu.
Uziqeqeshela isimo sezulu esishisayo/ esinomswakama kakhulu.
Gwema iziphuzo ezinoshukela omningi nezamandla njengomthombo wakho omkhulu wokunisela.
Ukuphuza amanzi uma ugula (umkhuhlane, amakhaza)
Kungani amanzi ebalulekile uma ugula
Uma izinga lakho lokushisa liphezulu, uyakhotha kakhulu futhi uphefumula ngokushesha, ngakho umzimba wakho ulahlekelwa amanzi amaningi
Izimpawu zomkhuhlane/umkhuhlane womisa. Ikhala eligelezayo, ukuphefumula ngokushesha, ukukhwehlela, futhi ikakhulukazi ukuhlanza noma isifo sohudo (uma kukhona) konke kukhipha amanzi emzimbeni wakho.
Uketshezi lusiza uhlelo lwakho lomzimba lokuzivikela. Amanzi asiza igazi lakho ukuthwala izakhamzimba namaseli omzimba lapho edingeka khona, futhi asiza nezinso zakho ekususeni imfucuza.
Izimpawu zokuthi ungase ungaphuzi ngokwanele
Umchamo ophuzi omnyama kanye nokuchama kancane kakhulu
Umlomo nezindebe ezomile kakhulu
Ukuzizwa unesiyezi, ubuthakathaka, noma ukhathele kakhulu
Ikhanda elibuhlungu kakhulu uma usukuma
Uma ubona lezi zimpawu, zama ukwandisa ukuphuzwa kwakho kwamanzi.
Yini nokuthi uphuze kanjani
Amanzi ahlanzekile: ukukhetha okuyinhloko, phuza kancane njalo.
Uketshezi olufudumele: amanzi afudumele, itiye le-herbal, noma umhluzi ohlanzekile unga: Ukuthobisa umphimbo obuhlungu, ukusiza ukukhulula amafinyila, kukwenza uzizwe ukhululekile.

Isixazululo sokubuyisela amanzi ngomlomo (ORS) noma iziphuzo ze-electrolyte: Ziwusizo uma unezinga lokushisa eliphezulu, ukugabha, noma isifo sohudo, ukuze ubuyisele kokubili amanzi nosawoti. Gwema iziphuzo ezinoshukela omningi kakhulu.
👉 Ithiphu: Uma ungathandi ukuphuza kakhulu ngesikhathi esisodwa, phuza kancane njalo emizuzwini embalwa.
Nini ukufuna usizo lwezokwelapha (okubalulekile)
Ukuphuza amanzi ekhaya kuyasiza, kodwa kufanele ubone udokotela uma:
Awukwazi ukugcina uketshezi luphansi (ukuhlanza konke)
Uzizwa ukhungathekile kakhulu, udidekile, noma inhliziyo yakho ishaya ngokushesha kakhulu.
Unezinkinga zokuphefumula, ubuhlungu besifuba, noma umkhuhlane ophakeme, oqhubekayo.
Umntwana omncane, ingane, owesifazane okhulelwe, noma umuntu osebudala ubonisa izimpawu zokoma.
I-hydration ayiqedi ukugula, kodwa isiza umzimba wakho ukuthi ululame kangcono.
Amacebiso okugcwelisa umzimba abasebenzi behhovisi, abafundi nabashayeli
Abasebenzi basehhovisi
Gcina ibhodlela lamanzi phezu kwedeski lakho lapho ungalibona khona.
Phuza ingilazi encane (150–250 ml) njalo emahoreni angu-1–2.
Sebenzisa “izikhuthazi”: phuza lapho uhlolela ama-imeyili, uqeda umsebenzi, noma ubuya ekhefini.
Nciphisa ikhofi neziphuzo ezinoshukela; ake amanzi alula abe yisinqumo sakho esiyinhloko.
Abafundi
Qala usuku ngengilazi encane yamanzi ngaphambi kokuya esikoleni.
Phatha ibhodlela elisebenziseka kabusha futhi uphuze ngesikhathi sekhefu phakathi kwamakilasi.
Lapho ufunda isikhathi eside, phuza amasiphu ambalwa njalo emizuzwini engama-30–45.
Ungathembeli eziphuzweni ezinikeza amandla noma itiye elimnandi kakhulu njengoketshezi lwakho oluyinhloko.
Abashayeli
Phuza amanzi ngaphambi kokuthatha uhambo olude ngemoto ukuze uqiniseke ukuthi umanziswe kahle.
Ngaso sonke isikhathi phatha ibhodlela lamanzi ngenkathi ushayela, ikakhulukazi ohambweni olude
Emgwaqweni omude, yima njalo emahoreni amabili ukuze uzolise futhi uphuze amanzi. Lokhu kungasiza ukuvimbela ukukhathala nokuthuthukisa ukugxila endleleni.
Khetha amanzi ukuze uhlale unamanzi isikhathi eside kunokuphuza iziphuzo ezinoshukela kanye nekhephini.
Ngisho emihambweni emifushane, phuza amanzi kancane kancane ukuze ugcine amandla nokuba qaphelile, ikakhulukazi uma ushayela isikhathi eside.
Okuqukethwe Kwesizini Nesimo
Phuza Amanzi
Izinzuzo Zempilo
Isikhumba Esinempilo
Isizini
Hlola
Ukugxila kuphela ekutheni uphuza kangakanani amanzi, hhayi ukuthi umchamo wakho ubukeka kanjani
Amacebiso Awusizo
